charlatan v0.4.1.92
  • Get started
  • Reference
  • Articles
    • Contributing to charlatan
  • Changelog

Create fake jobs

Source: R/job.R
ch_job.Rd

Create fake jobs

ch_job(n = 1, locale = NULL)

Arguments

n

(integer) number of things to get, any non-negative integer
locale

(character) the locale to use. Run JobProvider$new()$allowed_locales() for locales supported (default: en_US)

See also

JobProvider

Examples

ch_job()

#> [1] "Water engineer"
ch_job(10)

#>  [1] "Leisure centre manager"                           
#>  [2] "Psychologist, counselling"                        
#>  [3] "IT consultant"                                    
#>  [4] "Hydrogeologist"                                   
#>  [5] "Horticulturist, amenity"                          
#>  [6] "Scientist, research (physical sciences)"          
#>  [7] "Environmental consultant"                         
#>  [8] "Insurance account manager"                        
#>  [9] "Social researcher"                                
#> [10] "Historic buildings inspector/conservation officer"
ch_job(500)

#>   [1] "Designer, blown glass/stained glass"                      
#>   [2] "Purchasing manager"                                       
#>   [3] "Marketing executive"                                      
#>   [4] "Lawyer"                                                   
#>   [5] "Designer, blown glass/stained glass"                      
#>   [6] "Engineer, automotive"                                     
#>   [7] "Special effects artist"                                   
#>   [8] "Community arts worker"                                    
#>   [9] "Commissioning editor"                                     
#>  [10] "Colour technologist"                                      
#>  [11] "Health promotion specialist"                              
#>  [12] "Health physicist"                                         
#>  [13] "Engineer, electronics"                                    
#>  [14] "Community education officer"                              
#>  [15] "Chief Operating Officer"                                  
#>  [16] "Arts administrator"                                       
#>  [17] "Human resources officer"                                  
#>  [18] "Illustrator"                                              
#>  [19] "Research scientist (life sciences)"                       
#>  [20] "Copy"                                                     
#>  [21] "Associate Professor"                                      
#>  [22] "Hydrogeologist"                                           
#>  [23] "Learning mentor"                                          
#>  [24] "Engineering geologist"                                    
#>  [25] "Oceanographer"                                            
#>  [26] "Scientist, physiological"                                 
#>  [27] "Nurse, learning disability"                               
#>  [28] "Biochemist, clinical"                                     
#>  [29] "General practice doctor"                                  
#>  [30] "Soil scientist"                                           
#>  [31] "Administrator, Civil Service"                             
#>  [32] "Psychologist, occupational"                               
#>  [33] "Logistics and distribution manager"                       
#>  [34] "Call centre manager"                                      
#>  [35] "Scientific laboratory technician"                         
#>  [36] "Customer service manager"                                 
#>  [37] "Administrator, arts"                                      
#>  [38] "Financial adviser"                                        
#>  [39] "Designer, interior/spatial"                               
#>  [40] "Oncologist"                                               
#>  [41] "Fine artist"                                              
#>  [42] "Research officer, political party"                        
#>  [43] "Public relations officer"                                 
#>  [44] "Pharmacist, hospital"                                     
#>  [45] "Sports development officer"                               
#>  [46] "Sub"                                                      
#>  [47] "Actuary"                                                  
#>  [48] "Lighting technician, broadcasting/film/video"             
#>  [49] "Air cabin crew"                                           
#>  [50] "Air traffic controller"                                   
#>  [51] "Designer, ceramics/pottery"                               
#>  [52] "Mining engineer"                                          
#>  [53] "Insurance risk surveyor"                                  
#>  [54] "Electronics engineer"                                     
#>  [55] "Management consultant"                                    
#>  [56] "Site engineer"                                            
#>  [57] "Retail merchandiser"

#>  [59] "Hydrographic surveyor"

#> [475] "Merchant navy officer"                                    
#> [476] "Horticulturist, amenity"                                  
#> [477] "Electronics engineer"                                     
#> [478] "Estate agent"                                             
#> [479] "Heritage manager"                                         
#> [480] "Telecommunications researcher"                            
#> [481] "Museum/gallery conservator"

#> [483] "Tree surgeon"                                             
#> [484] "Printmaker"                                               
#> [485] "Operational investment banker"                            
#> [486] "Dentist"                                                  
#> [487] "Forensic scientist"                                       
#> [488] "Surveyor, rural practice"                                 
#> [489] "Occupational therapist"                                   
#> [490] "Sport and exercise psychologist"                          
#> [491] "Designer, jewellery"                                      
#> [492] "Journalist, magazine"                                     
#> [493] "Information systems manager"                              
#> [494] "Radio broadcast assistant"                                
#> [495] "Office manager"                                           
#> [496] "Pathologist"                                              
#> [497] "Surveyor, building control"                               
#> [498] "Charity officer"                                          
#> [499] "Sports development officer"                               
#> [500] "Music tutor"                                              

ch_job(locale = "da_DK", n = 10)

#>  [1] "Analytiker"       "Eksportchef"      "Driftstekniker"   "Klinikassistent" 
#>  [5] "Historiker"       "Molekylærbiolog"  "Danselærer"       "Afdelingslæge"   
#>  [9] "Arbejdsmand"      "Kontorfuldmægtig"
ch_job(locale = "fi_FI", n = 10)

#>  [1] "Padonhoitaja"                   "Johtava kuluttajaoikeusneuvoja"
#>  [3] "Jakeluvastaava"                 "Sanomakeskusaliupseeri"        
#>  [5] "Digitaalisen kokeen toteuttaja" "Ulosottojohtaja"               
#>  [7] "Graafikko"                      "Nosturinkuljettaja"            
#>  [9] "Rakennemuutosjohtaja"           "Kaapeli-insinööri"             
ch_job(locale = "fr_FR", n = 10)

#>  [1] "Déménageur"                            
#>  [2] "Analyste financier"                    
#>  [3] "Directeur artistique"                  
#>  [4] "Architecte d'intérieur"                
#>  [5] "Chef de projet démantèlement nucléaire"
#>  [6] "Agent de développement local"          
#>  [7] "Conseiller en salle de remise en forme"
#>  [8] "Cogniticien"                           
#>  [9] "Audioprothésiste"                      
#> [10] "Opérateur en traitement des matériaux" 
ch_job(locale = "fr_CH", n = 10)

#>  [1] "Expert protection incendie avec diplôme fédéral"    
#>  [2] "Mouleur de fonderie CFC"                            
#>  [3] "Monteur de réseaux eau et gaz avec brevet fédéral"  
#>  [4] "dipl. IT-Service-Manager NDS HF"                    
#>  [5] "Chef carreleur avec brevet fédéral"                 
#>  [6] "pilote diplômé ES"                                  
#>  [7] "Poseur de sol – parquet CFC"                        
#>  [8] "Maréchal-forgeron, maître"                          
#>  [9] "Chef de projet verre avec brevet fédéral"           
#> [10] "Expert en gestion hospitalière avec diplôme fédéral"
ch_job(locale = "hr_HR", n = 10)

#>  [1] "Automehaničar"                                                       
#>  [2] "Viši konzervator –  restaurator"                                     
#>  [3] "Pomoćnik strojovođe"                                                 
#>  [4] "Strojobravar"                                                        
#>  [5] "Kustos"                                                              
#>  [6] "Prvostupnik sestrinstva"                                             
#>  [7] "Osoba stručno osposobljena za uzgoj riba i drugih morskih organizama"
#>  [8] "Autoelektričar"                                                      
#>  [9] "Stručni radnik u ustanovi socijalne skrbi"                           
#> [10] "Inspektor sigurnosti unutarnje plovidbe"                             
ch_job(locale = "fa_IR", n = 10)

#>  [1] "گروهبان"     "گله\fدار"    "چوپان"       "دانش\fآموز"  "جنگلبان"    
#>  [6] "خطاط"        "خبر\fنگار"   "دندان\fپزشک" "مجسمه\fساز"  "چشم\fپزشک"  
ch_job(locale = "pl_PL", n = 10)

#>  [1] "Agent celny"                "Dyrektor kreatywny"        
#>  [3] "Taksówkarz"                 "Podleśniczy"               
#>  [5] "Marynarz"                   "Agent ubezpieczeniowy"     
#>  [7] "Technik technologii drewna" "Kurator sztuki"            
#>  [9] "Masztalerz"                 "Stajenny"                  
ch_job(locale = "ru_RU", n = 10)

#>  [1] "Палеонтолог"         "Биоинженер"          "Портной"            
#>  [4] "Педагог"             "Сексолог"            "Уролог"             
#>  [7] "Танатолог"           "Квасник"             "Мерчандайзер"       
#> [10] "Инженер-конструктор"
ch_job(locale = "uk_UA", n = 10)

#>  [1] "Музичний редактор"    "Бухгалтер"            "Режисер"             
#>  [4] "Музикознавець"        "Науковець"            "Слідчий"             
#>  [7] "Археолог"             "Геофізик"             "Музикознавець"       
#> [10] "Державний службовець"
ch_job(locale = "zh_TW", n = 10)

#>  [1] "美髮工作者"       "建築物清潔工"     "中餐廚師"         "調酒師／吧台人員"
#>  [5] "領隊"             "測試人員"         "補習班老師"       "中等學校教師"    
#>  [9] "FAE工程師"        "廣告企劃主管"
